mapper.sql: dr.id, dr.elder_id elderId, e.name elderName, dr.report_date reportDate, dr.total_records totalRecords, dr.activity_minutes activityMinutes, dr.sleep_minutes sleepMinutes, dr.medication_count medicationCount, dr.abnormal_count abnormalCount, dr.risk_level riskLevel, dr.summary, dr.suggestion, dr.status, dr.create_date createDate, dr.update_date updateDate
mapper.select:
select
from t_daily_report dr left join t_elder e on dr.elder_id = e.id where dr.id = #{id}

select
from t_daily_report dr left join t_elder e on dr.elder_id = e.id where dr.elder_id = #{elderId} and dr.report_date = date(#{reportDate}) limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into t_daily_report (elder_id, report_date, total_records, activity_minutes, sleep_minutes, medication_count, abnormal_count, risk_level, summary, suggestion, status, create_date, update_date) values (#{elderId}, #{reportDate}, #{totalRecords}, #{activityMinutes}, #{sleepMinutes}, #{medicationCount}, #{abnormalCount}, #{riskLevel}, #{summary}, #{suggestion}, #{status}, now(), now())
mapper.update: update t_daily_report set elder_id = #{elderId}, report_date = #{reportDate}, total_records = #{totalRecords}, activity_minutes = #{activityMinutes}, sleep_minutes = #{sleepMinutes}, medication_count = #{medicationCount}, abnormal_count = #{abnormalCount}, risk_level = #{riskLevel}, summary = #{summary}, suggestion = #{suggestion}, status = #{status}, update_date = now() where id = #{id}
